subcodes.first_line: O thou daughter of the Kingdom! Thy letter was received. Thou hadst asked about fate, predestination and will.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنت ملکوت نامه ات رسید از قضا و قدر و اراده سوال نموده بودی قضا و قدر
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @law of cause and effect
